title: Entity: Draft note structure (draft)
lead: Draft notes hold work-in-progress content that has not yet been assigned a final [entity type](../6). Use a draft when you are unsure which entity fits or when content is still forming. Promote drafts to the correct entity type (e.g. [concept](../8), [move](../16), [reference](../9), [article](../11)) once the content stabilizes.
